problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optogenetic. Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
